dateline: Khartoum / Port Sudan / El Fasher, Sudan — April 2023–Present
heroHeadline: SAF vs RSF: Sudan's Civil War Engulfs Khartoum, Darfur, and the Sahel
heroSubtitle: Tracking 1,070 days of civil war between Sudan's Armed Forces and Rapid Support Forces — the world's largest humanitarian crisis, with 12 million displaced and famine declared in Darfur
footerNote: Data sourced from UN OCHA, UNHCR, WFP, ACLED, HRW, Radio Dabanga, Sudan Tribune, Reuters, US State Department, and UN Fact-Finding Mission on Sudan
